title: Orange Goo found in Alaska
wikitext:
[]: Orange Goo found in Alaska             Quote Post by Pman » Sat Aug 06, 2011 9:27 pm That's right folks, it's starting... [url]http://hosted.ap.org/dynamic/stories/U/US_ALASKA_ORANGE_MYSTERY?SITE=AP&SECTION=HOME&TEMPLATE=DEFAULT&CTIME=2011-08-06-05-16-38[/url] Strange no? Got the red lake in Texas.. (?) SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Sun Aug 07, 2011 12:44 am "Oh no! They dehydrated Misato!" "The bastards!" I'd be interested to hear follow-up on this... It sounds really weird. On the topic of attention-yanking, spit-take headlines: MSNBC.com wrote: "Was Earth's moon made by 2 moons crashing?"

[]:             Quote Post by Chroma » Tue Aug 09, 2011 11:30 pm First thing I thought when I saw this story on a different site during the weekend: it's LCL. Second thought? Instrumentality is beginning.

[]:             Quote Post by tehprognoob » Mon Aug 22, 2011 12:10 pm Go thru Instrumentality Imagine self as the richest man in the world with the world rebuilt ??? Profiot!

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Mon Aug 22, 2011 4:27 pm But you wouldn't actually be rich, and the rebuilt world would be part of you.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Mon Aug 22, 2011 9:20 pm Why is it that we've been having so many threads of this sort lately? Maybe it has something to do with seeing four horsemen outside my window? Brace yourselves, it's now only a matter of time before a meteor impacts Antarctica.

[]:             Quote Post by pen-pen » Tue Aug 23, 2011 12:41 am ...Oh Crap....
